description_long: This is an ornate, high-backed wooden chair with a rich, dark mahogany finish and gold decorative accents. The chair features a tall, rectangular backrest with a rounded top and intricate gold embellishments at the crest. Both armrests are supported by turned wooden posts with gold finials, and the seat is broad and flat, matching the deep wood grain of the rest of the chair. The legs are straight and sturdy, with gold trim at the base and along the edges, and there is an arched support structure beneath the seat. The overall design is reminiscent of a ceremonial or throne-like chair, suggesting a sense of authority and formality. This chair would likely be found in a formal indoor setting such as a city hall, courthouse, or historic building.
description: A richly decorated, high-backed wooden chair with gold accents, armrests, and a formal, throne-like appearance. The dark wood and ornate details suggest a ceremonial or official use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall backrest, straight legs, and armrest with gold finials.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the ornate gold crest, broad seat, and symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and leg details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid wood back panel and gold trim, with no visible seat or armrest details.
